pr.title: Record: SLOT + Split-LR + Full GPTQ + XSA-all — val_bpb 1.1015 (3-seed mean)

output.summary: Uses split early/late Muon LR, sigmoid-gated skips, soft-round GPTQ QAT, larger BigramHash, and SLOT eval deltas atop the sliding-window stack.
techniques: Split early/late Muon LR with extended warmdown
Sigmoid-gated skips plus larger BigramHash and soft-round GPTQ QAT
SLOT eval-time delta tuning on sliding-window scoring
